description_long: This grave yard monument features a large, intricately sculpted angel statue seated on a raised rectangular pedestal. The angel, with detailed wings and flowing robes, holds an object in one hand and rests the other on a plaque, which is mounted on the front of the pedestal. The monument sits atop a polished black stone base, which is surrounded by a cobblestone platform. The grave area itself is demarcated by a large, flat, black stone slab adjacent to the angel statue. The overall design is solemn and grand, with a strong contrast between the light gray of the statue and the deep black of the stonework. The monument is likely made of marble or granite, giving it a dignified and enduring presence.
description: A grand grave monument with a seated angel statue on a black stone base, accompanied by a large flat grave slab and surrounded by cobblestone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angel statue, the plaque, and the full length of the grave slab with the cobblestone border.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the grave slab and the profile of the angel statue.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view focusing on the back of the angel statue and the overall layout of the monument.
description_view_3: Back view showing the angel's wings and the rear of the grave slab, with the cobblestone platform visible.
